title: Tests: pytest unit+integration + Locust + Lighthouse CI
description: Coverage targets: services/ > 80%, api/ > 70%. Full checkout integration test. IoT WebSocket e2e test < 3sec. Locust 100 RPS p95 < 200ms.
unit_tests: tests/unit/products/test_product_service.py: get_by_slug_found, get_by_slug_404, reserve_stock_success(Lua mock), reserve_insufficient->409, cursor_pagination
tests/unit/orders/test_order_service.py: create_success, no_stock->409, webhook_valid_hmac, webhook_invalid_hmac->400, webhook_idempotent
integration_tests: tests/integration/test_checkout_flow.py: Register->Login->GET product->POST cart->POST order->POST webhook(HMAC)->GET order status=PAID
acceptance_criteria: Lighthouse artifact appears in GitLab CI
